description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stylised circular case, cut-out and metallic brand detail, has a stainless steel backDial style: Pink dial with branding, silver toned hands and markingsFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap Style: White leather strap with a tang clasp and two loopsWater resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Fastrack caseWarranty: 2 years from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
